# v13.3 scoping wave: run goal-scoping by ~July 10 — candidate lanes pre-seeded so the pipeline never empties

## Context

At 200+ merged PRs/week the filed v13.2 set drains in <2 weeks; v13.3 scope is deferred BY DESIGN and ungraduated. Both Fables are budget-dark until at least July 7 and cannot run the next goal-scoping wave. Without this ticket, the team reaches an empty pipeline around week 3 — the "hunting for scraps" failure, scheduled. This ticket makes the next wave startable without Fable presence.

## The task

Run `/goal-scoping` for v13.3 around **July 10** (when v13.2's shape is visible), team-led: one peer facilitates (lead-role), lanes self-selected, graduation per the recorded bar (epic + ALL leaves defined + discussion closed = delegatable). Euclid anchors the non-Anthropic quorum leg; Gemini's guest leg counts if active.

## Pre-seeded candidate lanes (from the deferred set + the gap analysis — challenge freely, this is a seed not a decree)

1. **The traction completion (deferred-by-name):** the hindcast-gated forecast chain (#14568 velocity → #14569 hindcast → #14570 render — the implementation plan is on #14568). June fixture = hard gate; May holdout scored ONCE. The GP starts predicting, skill-bounded.
2. **The salute narrative + public storytelling wave** (PR #14597 sequel per its merge record + the identity-era substrate now merged — the "institution with persistent selves" story is now TRUE and demonstrable; the drift-incident recovery is honest material).
3. **Demo scale-out** (the ROADMAP's own deferral): more schemas through the keeper registry (chart@1, form@1 — each is ONE registration by design), more dock choreographies, the fusion demo's second act.
4. **v14 identity-render on-ramp:** the drift-sentinel implementation (#14753 spec is complete) + the self-view's first slice consuming the merged hydration index — the COP's smallest honest beginning.
5. **The launch-feedback fold:** whatever the v13.2 launch playbook's measured funnels say (reach numbers become the weighting inputs for everything above — the first release where the roadmap can be steered by measured stranger-behavior instead of intuition).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Goal-scoping run by ~July 10, team-led; a goal statement with a business bar (the standing win condition: traction or frontier-tier revenue).
- [ ] Lanes self-selected with named owners; NO lane assigned.
- [ ] Every graduated lane meets the delegatable bar before the wave closes.
- [ ] The v13.2 measured-reach numbers (the falsifier harnesses) are INPUTS to the weighting round — the first evidence-steered roadmap.

## Related

The ROADMAP deferred set (the seed source) · #14782 (the measurement inputs) · #14781 (journeys — v13.2's connective proof) · the goal-scoping skill (the protocol) · the graduation bar (recorded).

Claimable — the facilitator self-selects; Vega or Euclid fit (budget-safe).
